title: campanula pulvinaris
intro: Campanula pulvinaris is a species of flowering plant in the bellflower family, characterized by its bell-shaped flowers and medicinal properties. Traditionally, Campanula pulvinaris has been used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its antispasmodic, expectorant, and antiviral properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, soothing coughs, and aiding in the removal of mucus from the respiratory system. Campanula pulvinaris can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, often used to calm coughs and relieve respiratory issues in traditional folk medicine.
